title: Interview Prep
description: AI-powered interview preparation platform built with Clean Architecture to simulate realistic job interviews based on a candidate's CV, target role, and company context. Generates tailored interview questions, evaluates responses, provides personalized feedback, tracks performance across interview sessions, and includes automated unit testing for core business logic.

title: Spaza Stock Manager
description: Enterprise-style inventory management system for retail and spaza shops. Built with Clean Architecture, Azure SQL, stored procedures, supplier management, stock tracking, inventory valuation, operational dashboards, and unit-tested business workflows.

title: Authentication System
description: Full-stack authentication platform providing secure user registration, login, JWT authentication, refresh token management, role-based authorization, protected routes, and unit-tested authentication workflows. Designed as the foundation for a future reusable identity platform.

title: SmartWheel
description: Gamified rewards platform where users solve riddles to earn spins and win prizes. Features backend-controlled prize allocation, reward tracking, balance management, cooldown enforcement, Clean Architecture, and unit-tested business rules.

title: EventReserve
description: Event reservation platform that allows users to create, manage, and track event bookings through a responsive React frontend and ASP.NET Core API. Features reservation management, event scheduling, validation, and RESTful API integration.

title: Course Enrollment App
description: Full-stack course enrollment platform featuring JWT authentication, course management, enrollment workflows, and a Clean Architecture approach using Blazor and ASP.NET Core.
